title: Chapter 182
content:
Relationships are complicated to explain… usually, people fall in love by the convenience of their own destiny, which finds and unites them in ways that even the Universe could not predict.

It's cliché, how could it not be? I mean, there are romances of all types and cases, but sometimes it's just the wanting that makes the change work. A romance doesn't appear out of nowhere. Who said that? For Cristine… well, she didn't exactly know when that started. She had a certain notion, perhaps.

A man who defies the very existence of Chaos… that's how she saw Strax when she truly met him. Enemies are common, stories of ex-enemies falling in love are common, but not that of a devoted assassin to the God of Death falling for a man who killed her two brothers in cold blood, without even feeling remorse…

Okay, that was too much…

But what I mean is… Unexpected things happen all the time, and honestly, so what? Sometimes, love arises from the most unlikely circumstances, defying all expectations and logic. And somehow, that's what makes love so fascinating and true.

[The System is reacting to Cristine Blair]

Cristine leaned back on the pillow, still with the warmth of Strax's kiss on her lips and the comforting sensation of his embrace etched in her memory. The revelation of her feelings was something she had never planned, something beyond her rational understanding. That moment was a breach of her expectations, an unexpected intrusion into her well-organized and calculated world.

She smiled to herself, with no one to witness the internal change. She thought about how complicated and wonderful this new feeling was. Amid her life full of darkness and responsibilities, Strax brought an unexpected light, and maybe that was what she needed.

"Maybe that's what love does," she whispered to the emptiness around her thoughts, "it defies order, mixes with chaos, and creates something beautiful and unexpected."

Her thoughts were interrupted when Strax entered the room, still with a concerned look, bringing a jug of water. "How are you feeling now?" he asked gently.

Cristine turned to him, a sincere smile lighting up her face. "Better. Much better, actually."

Strax sat beside her, his presence a constant comfort. "I'm glad to hear that." He said, handing her a glass of water.

Some time passed.

Strax had sat beside her while stroking her hair to help her sleep, something she hadn't initially refused, but she… didn't want to sleep anymore. The soft light of the room had created a cozy and peaceful atmosphere. They talked for hours about trivial things like the Temple that Cristine was part of, her life as a nun, and other matters she had never told anyone.

Thus, creating a sense of closeness that they were both beginning to explore.

"Do you intend to have more wives?" she suddenly asked, after several silly stories that had passed quickly. "Who knows? It's not like I could avoid it either," he murmured, remembering the name of the System… 'Demonic Dragon Harem System… well, it's obvious what life I'll have,' he thought.

Hearing this, Cristine turned to Strax, her eyes shining with a mix of emotions that made him raise his eyebrows. She gently pulled his hand, bringing him closer to her. "Now that you know this side of me," she began, her voice low and laden with emotion, "I want to show you how much this means to me." She murmured as she climbed onto him.

Strax stared into the woman's eyes, feeling the weight of her body on his lap as he continued leaning against the bed's padding. He felt a strange sensation, as if a new level of connection was forming between them.

Cristine leaned in slightly, her hands sliding gently over Strax's shoulder. "I'll make it worth it," she whispered as she moved closer to his ear, her words filled with a wicked feeling. "I don't want to regret this later," she said before biting his ear, a touch that sent a shiver across his entire body…

'This woman… knows how to provoke me,' he thought, feeling the desire grow, and his response was immediate. He wrapped Cristine in a firm, protective embrace, his hands exploring her waist in a calm, gentle, and bold touch.

Cristine, sensing his response, leaned even closer, her lips almost touching Strax's. The heat between them was almost unbearable, and the connection forming was intense and charged with primal emotion… 'So beautiful…' she thought as she looked into Strax's blood-red eyes before finally moving closer again.

She hesitated for a moment but finally moved forward, leaning in to capture Strax's lips with hers in a passionate kiss. She felt something she had never felt in her life, the world stopped for her in that moment, nothing but him was in front of her, leaving only the delicious sensation of their lips merging in an unprecedented warmth.

Nothing else mattered besides the heat of their bodies and the burning kiss that consumed them.

Cristine was gradually learning how to kiss better; after all, it was the first time she had done something like this. Although it felt instinctive, she was trying to take control, but she was quickly being defeated by the experienced man in front of her… well, she imagined it would be something like this; after all, this man already had three wives.

But he, on the other hand, was enjoying it, being gentle and sweet. He started savoring the taste of her mouth slowly, with no malicious intent, just the calmest and most sincere kiss from a woman learning to show her feelings to him.

'So good…' Cristine thought, feeling the man holding her waist, soon feeling her whole body tingling as Strax's warm hand slid down her neck, pulling her closer.

"She's really giving herself up here…" he thought as he continued exploring Cristine's mouth; he gently caressed her face while his other hand held her waist... Well, he wouldn't deny it to her; he would never deny it to any woman who liked him.

His hand started moving up as the kisses grew more intense; the whole place was warm, completely hot, as if the space were a sauna, but it was only at that small point where their bodies met. Strax's hand stopped moving up and went back, resting on her buttocks.

"!!!" She was startled but didn't push him away.

He wanted to understand something first… so he separated from her lips and looked at the cute and lustful expression on the woman's face; the nun was no longer in his view, much less the assassin, just a woman with obscene desires that he would love to fulfill.

"You know there's no turning back, right?" he asked, wanting to hear it directly from her; after all, just the action wasn't enough. He wanted her, he wanted her entirely, he wanted all of her, so it was only fair that she said what she was truly feeling because when it happened…

"I won't regret it." She murmured, blushing as he smiled. She never imagined she could even say that to someone, but she gathered courage from every part of her being, which burned with desire, "I want to be yours." She said, sighing between fear and embarrassment.

His reaction could be nothing else, of course… "Then you are mine… Forever." He said, his possessive dark gaze beginning to blend with his desires, and then, with confirmation.

Strax quickly swapped positions with her, changing their places… "!!!" She felt something strange; she was now lying down, and between her legs was the man holding her. Her legs closed involuntarily, wrapping around the man's waist, who attacked her again with lustful kisses.

The only thing passing through both of their minds was... "I want more," he said out loud.

Wet sounds echoed in the room.

Kiss* Kiss* Kiss*

[Harem Member Added: Cristine Blair Successfully Conquered]

The system chimed as he continued to enjoy the sweet lips of the assassin woman who was now… just an excited little girl wanting more and more…

" S-Slowly…" she groaned between kisses.

After they pulled away from the passionate kiss, Cristine looked at Strax with eyes still a bit dazed, clearly immersed in the moment, and said quickly, "Take my clothes off now…" She said, blushing, unable to wait any longer!

Strax merely smiled like a predator as he quickly removed his own clothes. Then, he approached Cristine and began undressing her.

First, he gently removed the leather garment, which was a bit creased and wrinkled from being pressed against Strax's strong arms for so long...

NA: Hello everyone, I'm going to put this notice here in the chapter because many people skip the notices area: Well, I'm currently in the process of moving, well, looking for an apartment actually, so it's possible that there will be some delays in posting Harem System, Blood Legacy and my new novel My Wives Are Beautiful Demons.

I just wanted to let you know this, so you don't worry, if there is any delay, I'll make up for it with extra chapters for the days that are missing!
